meta.title: The media is LYING about Russia's new 'HYPERSONIC' missile
meta.description:
Go to https://ground.news/Sandboxx to stay fully informed on military developments around the world. Subscribe through my link right now for 40% off their Vantage Plan, which is what I use everyday.

– BREAK –

In recent days, you may have seen a lot of media coverage about Russia’s deployment of an advanced new weapon called Oreshnik. Unfortunately, a lot of that media coverage is badly missing the mark.
